narrative:
Fayette County has 16,768 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.1 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.0% of registrants.
